suppress.notes: The advisory applies to Prometheus server behavior. The matched Maven artifact is Micrometer's registry integration and is not the affected server product. This correction is limited to one package and one CVE and expires for mandatory review.

JetBrains documents CVE-2020-29582 as resolved in Kotlin 1.4.21. The scanned component is kotlin-stdlib 1.9.25. The current generic Kotlin CPE range over-matches this fixed version. The correction is restricted to the exact package/version and CVE.

GHSA-2c5c-chwr-9hqw affects io.netty:netty-codec-http3 from 4.2.0.Final through 4.2.12.Final. The scanned component is the distinct io.netty:netty-transport module on the 4.1 branch. The generic Netty CPE association is therefore corrected only for this exact package/version and CVE.
